arts.ttl: Slot looking to boost Liverpool squad in summer
arts.sum: Liverpool head coach Arne Slot has said the club are already working on strengthening in the summer transfer window but insists he is happy with his squad.

arts.ttl: Arsenal and Liverpool in the same boat as £105m cut-off is zero issue for FSG or KSE ahead of deadline day
Man United didn't want me anymore - now I'm preparing for pretty strange Liverpool experience
arts.sum: Cody Gakpo arrived at Liverpool from PSV in 2023 but he have also joined rivals Manchester United before arriving at Anfield

arts.ttl: Player rubbishes Liverpool transfer claim publically – Explains why he was spotted at Ipswich game
arts.sum: Ajax defender Jorrel Hato has insisted he is not on the verge of joining Liverpool, despite being spotted at Anfield in the win over Ipswich Town. De Telegraaf cover comments from the defender today in a pre-match press conference, during which he was asked about his future. arts.ttl: Star set to arrive at Liverpool in summer offers telling one-word response over transfer
arts.sum: Giorgi Mamardashvili will join Liverpool in the summer after the Reds agreed a deal to sign the goalkeeper from Valencia last year, and the Georgia international has spoken about his move

arts.ttl: Arne Slot admits he's been surprised by Virgil van Dijk amid Liverpool contract standoff
arts.sum: Liverpool boss Arne Slot has hailed Reds captain Virgil van Dijk, although the 33-year-old's future remains up in the air with just six months left on his contract

arts.ttl: Report: How Arne Slot really feels about Liverpool selling Darwin Nunez in the near future
arts.sum: Thus far, Darwin Nunez’s debut season under Arne Slot at Liverpool has been slightly indifferent. Nunez scored two crucial goals away at Brentford recently to...

arts.ttl: Liverpool's eye-watering Champions League earnings with final game worth even more
arts.sum: Liverpool face PSV Eindhoven in Holland on Wednesday night and there could be a big financial benefit of finishing top of the new 36-team Champions League stage

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta sent Darwin Nunez transfer message as radical striker solution emerges
arts.sum: Arsenal have been advised that a high-profile move for Liverpool striker Darwin Nunez could help the Gunners finally win the Premier League title

arts.ttl: 'Definitely' - Arne Slot promises Liverpool transfers as January stance explained
arts.sum: The Liverpool head coach has been speaking to Gary Lineker about potential transfers at the end of the season
